本插件用于网页划词翻译，支持多语言切换和自动翻译。: This extension supports selection translation, language switching, and automatic translation.
选中网页文字即可显示翻译图标，点击图标进行翻译: Select text on a web page to show the translation icon, then click it to translate.
可在设置中配置自动翻译、快捷键等功能: You can configure auto translation, shortcuts, and more in settings.
支持多种翻译引擎：Google、DeepL、Bing等: Supports multiple translation engines, including Google, DeepL, and Bing.
可设置偏好语言和网站白名单/黑名单: You can configure preferred languages and site white/blacklists.
所有配置可导出备份，方便在不同设备间同步: All settings can be exported for backup and sync across devices.
选中文字后，双击 Ctrl 键即可快速翻译: After selecting text, double-press Ctrl to translate quickly.
可以设置自定义快捷键替代默认的 Ctrl 双击: You can set a custom shortcut instead of the default Ctrl double-press.
自定义快捷键支持组合键，如 Ctrl+Shift+T: Custom shortcuts support key combinations such as Ctrl+Shift+T.
关闭快捷键功能后，仍可通过点击翻译图标进行翻译: Even with shortcuts disabled, you can still click the translation icon.
翻译缓存可以显著提高重复翻译的速度: Translation cache can significantly speed up repeated translations.
缓存会自动过期，确保翻译结果的时效性: Cache expires automatically to keep translations fresh.
缓存数据仅存储在本地，不会上传到服务器: Cache data is stored locally and is not uploaded to a server.
清空缓存不会影响翻译功能，只是需要重新翻译: Clearing cache does not affect translation, but future requests must be translated again.
你可以为网站设置专属词典，优先替换翻译结果: You can create site-specific dictionaries to override translation results.
原文需精确匹配，建议区分大小写: Original text must match exactly; case sensitivity is recommended.
自定义词库仅对对应网站生效: Custom dictionaries only apply to their matching sites.
词库设置会同步保存到本地存储: Dictionary settings are saved to local storage.
Google TTS does not expose selectable vo: Google TTS does not expose selectable voices
Configure subtitle translation, speech-t: Configure subtitle translation, speech-to-text subtitles, and display behavior for supported video platforms.
Turn on subtitle translation and speech-: Turn on subtitle translation and speech-generated subtitles for supported video platforms.
Translate subtitles automatically on Bil: Translate subtitles automatically on Bilibili video pages.
Translate subtitles automatically on Net: Translate subtitles automatically on Netflix video pages.
Translate subtitles automatically on Ama: Translate subtitles automatically on Amazon Prime Video.
Detect the source language of the curren: Detect the source language of the current subtitle stream automatically.
Translate subtitles as they appear durin: Translate subtitles as they appear during video playback.
Translate each subtitle line immediately: Translate each subtitle line immediately instead of waiting for a larger segment.
Choose how translated subtitles are rend: Choose how translated subtitles are rendered.
Keep the source subtitle visible alongsi: Keep the source subtitle visible alongside the translation when possible.
Generate subtitles from speech when the: Generate subtitles from speech when the platform does not provide them.
Select the source language used for spee: Select the source language used for speech recognition.
Balance speed and accuracy for speech re: Balance speed and accuracy for speech recognition.
Adjust the size of translated subtitles.
Choose where translated subtitles are sh: Choose where translated subtitles are shown.
Cache translated subtitle segments to re: Cache translated subtitle segments to reduce repeated requests.
Placeholder actions for the upcoming sub: Placeholder actions for the upcoming subtitle workflow.
The test request uses the current form v: The test request uses the current form values and sends English text to the selected target language.
OpenAI-compatible providers use chat com: OpenAI-compatible providers use chat completions, Anthropic uses the messages API, Gemini uses generateContent, and Ollama uses the chat API.
If you leave custom Authorization header: If you leave custom Authorization headers empty, the API key will be injected automatically for supported providers.
Optional custom headers for the upstream: Optional custom headers for the upstream provider or API gateway.
Custom API requests are fixed to POST JS: Custom API requests are fixed to POST JSON so the extension can validate and cache responses consistently.
The custom API will receive a POST JSON: The custom API will receive a POST JSON body with text, sourceLang, targetLang, from, and to. Return a JSON object with translation or translatedText.
